data.title: Microstrategy Checks Every Box, So Why It Missed S&P 500 Inclusion?
data.description:
MicroStrategy (NASDAQ: MSTR) stock recently met the formal requirements for inclusion in the S&P 500. However, its addition is subject to the discretion of the S&P Dow Jones Indices committee. As per latest news update, it has missed the mark. In Q2 2025 MicroStrategy reported record earnings ( $10 billion net income on $114 million revenue)
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/09/06/microstrategy-checks-every-box-so-why-it-missed-sp-500-inclusion/

data.title: The first credit asset-backed securities issued by a national consumer finance company using blockchain technology was launched
data.description: Mashang Consumer Finance launched the nation's first blockchain-based financial management platform for consumer finance companies at the 2025 Smart China Expo Digital Industry Ecosystem Conference. Leveraging this platform, Mashang Consumer Finance successfully issued the "Anyihua 2025 Third Phase Personal Consumer Loan Asset-Backed Securities." According to a representative from Mashang Consumer Finance, this is the first credit asset-backed security issued by a consumer finance company in China using blockchain technology. Subsequent issuance of financial bonds, asset-backed securities, and other financial products will routinely utilize this platform's technology, continuously expanding the application of blockchain in the consumer finance sector. (Jinshi)

data.title: Planet Evening News | September 6
data.description: 1. ArkStream Capital announced an additional $10 million investment in Ethena; 2. Terraform Labs co-founder Do Kwon's bid to recover a $19.4 million mortgage payment was dismissed by the court; 3. SharpLink Gaming plans to stake some of its ETH assets after the Linea mainnet launch; 4. Galaxy Digital pledged 387,000 HYPE tokens, worth approximately $18.2 million; 5. Faraday Future will announce its C10 & Crypto strategy and product plan on its shareholder day on September 19; 6. CryptoQuant CEO: Justin Sun's sale of unlocked tokens is understandable, and the responsibility lies with the WLFI Foundation; 7. ALT 5 Sigma's holdings of WLFI tokens increased to 7.28 billion, worth approximately $1.31 billion; 8. The founder of RMRK claims his address was mistakenly identified as high-risk by WLFI and locked; 9. MyStonks reached a RWA agreement with the oracle project APRO. 10. Data: USDC circulation increased by approximately 2 billion in the past 7 days; 11. Market News: The Hong Kong SAR government is preparing for its third issuance of digital bonds.

data.title: Here are key dates to watch as Bitcoin bull cycle approaches the end
data.description:
As Bitcoin (BTC) consolidates around the $110,000 level, technical indicators suggest that the asset’s current bull cycle may be nearing its conclusion. According to prominent online analyst TradingShot, the maiden cryptocurrency is approaching a potential market peak in late 2025, to be followed by a significant correction into 2026. In a TradingView post on September 5, the analyst noted that historical data shows Bitcoin’s market structure often follows a recurring rhythm of tops, bear phases, and cycle bottoms. Each super cycle has tended to top out near the 0
source: https://finbold.com/here-are-key-dates-to-watch-as-bitcoin-bull-cycle-approaches-the-end/

data.title: Arkham Finds $5 Billion In Bitcoin That Germany Could Still Claim
data.description:
Germany’s liquidation of nearly 50,000 Bitcoin seized from the Movie2K piracy site in 2024 has drawn renewed attention after blockchain analysts identified another massive trove linked to the case. On September 5, blockchain analytics firm Arkham Intelligence reported that approximately 45,000 BTC tied to Movie2K remains untouched. What Can Germany do With the New Bitcoin Stash? The new coins, valued at nearly $5 billion, are distributed across more than 100 wallets and have shown no activity since 2019. Arkham suggested that the dormant funds are likely still controlled by the site’s operators
source: https://beincrypto.com/germany-bitcoin-comeback-5-billion-piracy-case/

data.title: Uniswap Faces Legal Heat From Bancor Over AMM Patent Claims
data.description:
Bancor was once one of the biggest names in crypto. In 2017 it raised $153 million, one of the largest ICOs of that time, with a promise to change how tokens could be traded. But only a year later, Uniswap launched with a far simpler design and quickly became the main place for token swaps
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/09/06/uniswap-faces-legal-heat-from-bancor-over-amm-patent-claims/

data.title: Nansen CEO Clarifies Misconceptions About WLFI Transactions
data.description: According to PANews, Nansen's CEO, Alex Svanevik, addressed concerns on the X platform regarding WLFI transactions. Initially, an AI Research Agent suggested that Justin Sun was involved in selling WLFI. However, upon further examination of the transaction timestamps, it was determined that Sun did not engage in a sell-off. Svanevik also noted that the related transfers occurred after a significant drop in WLFI's value, indicating they were not the primary cause of the price decline. Furthermore, based on the day's overall trading volume, these transactions likely did not have a substantial impact on the market price.
